# CWE-1286 vulnerable: accepts malformed JSON config
lang: go
file: CWE-1286-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1286: Improper Validation of Syntactic Correctness of Input.
// Vulnerable: webhook config JSON unmarshaled without schema or field checks.

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type HookConfig struct {
	URL     string `json:"url"`
	Enabled bool   `json:"enabled"`
}

func SaveHookConfig(db *gorm.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		body, err := c.GetRawData()
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		var cfg HookConfig
		if err := json.Unmarshal(body, &cfg); err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		if err := db.Exec("INSERT INTO hook_configs (url, enabled) VALUES (?, ?)", cfg.URL, cfg.Enabled).Error; err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"saved": true})
	}
}
